fix_summary: The patch correctly fixes the inverted topic predicate in KnowledgeService.get_by_topic by switching from inequality to equality on KnowledgeArticle.topic, and the focused service tests pass.
approval_reasons: The implementation is localized to the service layer as requested and does not alter unrelated route/model behavior.
The bug is directly corrected in get_by_topic by using KnowledgeArticle.topic == topic, which matches the stated acceptance criteria.
Regression coverage was added for same-topic inclusion and unrelated-topic exclusion.
Automated tests passed (3 passed), which the instructions treat as source of truth that the change resolves the issue.
